assignments.name: Assign_to_Funding_Award_Non_User_Participant_collection
assignments.label: Assign to Funding Award Non-User Participant collection

assignments.name: Assign_to_Funding_Award_Non_User_Participant_variable
assignments.label: Assign to Funding Award Non-User Participant variable

decisions.name: Check_if_Installer_Input_Id_is_Present
decisions.label: Check if Installer Input Id is Present

Flow.description: Enables a grant recipient to check for an installer by ID and looks for linked properties. If properties exist, the GR can add the installer to properties or to manage contacts. If no properties are found, a notification is shown.
Flow.label: DESNZ - Manage Installer Subflow

recordLookups.description: Gets all Funding Property Details records related to the Funding Award.
recordLookups.name: Get_All_Funding_Property_Detail_Records
recordLookups.label: Get All Funding Property Detail Records

recordLookups.description: Gets all Funding Property Details records related to the Funding Award.
recordLookups.name: Get_Installer_Funding_Property_Detail_Records
recordLookups.label: Get Installer Funding Property Detail Records

fields.name: Copy_3_of_InstallerText
fields.fieldText: Installer Added to Properties

fields.name: Copy_3_of_InformationText
fields.fieldText:
Thank you, the installer has now been added to the selected properties.


You can now leave this page or click "Search Installer" button to return to installer search screen.

fields.name: HdrInstallerActionChoice
fields.fieldText:
{!Get_Installer_Record.Name}


Phone : {!Get_Installer_Record.Phone}

Licence Number : {!Get_Installer_Record.Trustmark_Business_License_Number__c}

fields.name: SelectActionHeader
fields.fieldText: Please select the action you wish to perform with the selected installer

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_3_of_InstallerText
fields.fieldText: No Funding Properties Found

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_3_of_InformationText
fields.fieldText: I'm sorry, but we couldn't find any properties related to {!Get_Funding_Award.Name}.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_InstallerText
fields.fieldText: Select Properties

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_InformationText
fields.fieldText: Below is a list of all properties that belong to {!Get_Funding_Award.Name}. Please select the properties from the table below that you wish to add .
